allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add construction expense categories and project completion feature

- Add construction-specific expense categories: land_filling \(ถมดิน\),
  building_permit \(ขออนุญาต\), foundation \(งานฐานราก\), architect_fee \(ค่าสถาปนิก\)
- Group expense categories into General and Construction sections in UI
- Enhance project completion modal with asset evolution:
  - Update asset property_type \(e.g., land → house\)
  - Update asset status to ''owned'' \(available\)
  - Option to update asset name
- Add Budget vs Actual summary with enhanced progress bar
- Add SQL migrations for new expense categories and complete_project function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
